# INTaskType.completable

**Case**

A task that the intent can mark as completed.

## Declaration

```swift
case completable
```

## Constants

- **INTaskType.unknown**: An unknown type of task.
- **INTaskType.notCompletable**: A task that the intent can’t mark as completed.

items.description: A task that the intent can’t mark as completed.
items.name: INTaskType.notCompletable
